title: See the Magic of Camp in Action!
contentHtml:
Camp Barney Medintz is one of the best overnight camps in the southeast, and there’s nothing like witnessing the joy, friendships, and adventure of camp while it’s happening! Join us for a guided tour during the summer while camp is in session and see why campers say “At Camp Barney, I can be myself. I feel like I belong here more than anywhere else.”

Tour camp on Sunday, July 20 at 10:00 am, 4165 Highway 129 N. Cleveland, GA 30528. Spots are limited!

RSVP Now!

Note: RSVPs are required. Summer Tours are open to families who do not have children at Camp Barney Medintz during Summer 2025 at the time of the tour.

Why You Should Tour Camp Barney Medintz

✔ Get an inside look at why we were selected as one of America’s Best Summer Camps by Newsweek!
✔ See camp in action—sports, arts, outdoor adventures & more
✔ Meet our directors
✔ Explore cabins, dining halls, and activity areas
✔ Get answers to all your questions about sleepaway camp

Why Families Choose Camp Barney Medintz

✔ More than 60 years of experience in providing unforgettable summer experiences
✔ Expert Staff & Counselors – Caring, trained professionals ensure a safe, welcoming environment
✔ Exciting activities like swimming, archery, campfires & more
✔ Top-Notch Facilities – Beautiful campgrounds, modern cabins, and engaging activities
✔ Friendships that last a lifetime

About Camp Barney Medintz

Nestled in the North Georgia mountains on more than 500 acres with two lakes, Camp Barney Medintz offers a meaningful and transformative overnight camping experience for boys and girls completing K – 10th grade. During one-week, two-week, and four-week sessions, campers build lifelong friendships, gain independence, challenge themselves, and strengthen their identities, all while having the best summer!

RSVP for a Tour!
